modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty logging into the USD Parking System

full_description_text:  
User is trying to access the USD Parking System.  
They are encountering issues during the login process.  
No specific error messages are mentioned.  
Assistance is needed to resolve this login challenge.
